packageRules.description: uPortal runs JSR-286 (Portlet API 2.0). Portlet API 3.x (JSR-362) is incompatible with the container.

plexus-archiver 4.11+ requires a newer commons-io (BoundedInputStream.builder()) than the one bundled with maven-war-plugin 3.4.0 (pinned by uportal-portlet-parent). Revisit once the parent bumps maven-war-plugin to 3.5.x+.
